description: Improper EIP-2612 permit implementations that omit chain-specific domain separators, do not increment nonces, or ignore expiration allow signatures to be replayed across chains or multiple times. Attackers can repeatedly approve spending or re-use permits on forked networks.
name: Permit Signature Replay via Missing Domain Separator or Nonce
remediation: - Build EIP-712 domain separators including `name`, `version`, `chainId`, and `verifyingContract`. - Maintain per-owner nonces and increment on every successful permit. - Enforce deadlines and reject expired signatures.
